content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.47% with VIX +2% to 18.67 signals nervous tape; sectoral leadership is narrow (Energy/select Defence/Capital Goods up while broad indices red). With BAJAJ-AUTO and CESC binary results May 6 (tomorrow) and HAL/GESHIP results May 14, the next 1-2 sessions are catalyst-heavy — bias toward managing existing book (trailing SLs on winners, holding losers above SL) rather than stacking new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD-equivalent: position +5.9%, but stored SL 1025 is already at breakeven+. Today's intraday range 1037-1045 with CMP 1042 — pivot S1 1035, ideal trail would be 1030 but that's only 0.4% from CMP (violates 1% trail-gap rule). Keeping SL 1025 (1.65% below CMP) preserves room for normal chop. Target unchanged. Actually no-op vs stored values, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +5.9%, stored SL 1025 already locks in ~4% gain (entry 984). Trail to a tighter level would violate 1% trail-gap rule (CMP 1042). MACD bullish crossover, strong Q4 results (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%). Hold to target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.7%, SL 119 (-2.2% from CMP 121.78) intact. Gold consolidating after 22% pullback from peak; geopolitical hedge value preserved. VIX rising supports the hedge thesis. Hold to SL or target 135."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL already 23.85 (above entry 23.65); CMP 24.01 — gap 0.7% is below 1% trail floor. No-op MODIFY would be wasted. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 23.85 above entry, locks in marginal gain. Trail tighter would violate 1% gap rule (CMP 24.01). Pharma sector range-bound today. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1780.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.7% (CMP 1746). Stored SL 1715 already at entry+. Hit ATH 1757 today, now consolidating. CMP-SL gap = 1.8% (above 1% floor). Stored values match — no-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.7%, ATH printed at 1757 today on strong Q4 + heavy institutional buying ($7,400 cr Capital Group inflow). SL 1715 (-1.8% from CMP) locks in gain with adequate trail-gap. Hold to target 1780; will trail higher if break above 1757."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.2% with intraday -3.6% pullback after running to 52w high 1590 yesterday. SL 1510 (-0.7% below CMP) intact — close to floor but valid given board meeting May 14 (9 sessions away, outside 3-session binary window). Tanker rates structurally elevated. Hold; if SL hits, exit is clean."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.3% intraday, but SL 13400 still has room (CMP 13426 — only 0.2% above SL). Risk: SL could trip on next downtick. However, fundamentals strong (record April sales +33% YoY, 42% market share). Q4 results already out Apr 28. Holding through with conviction; if SL trips at 13400 it's a clean stop-out at -2.9% from entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.6%; CMP 205.07 vs SL 204 (gap 0.5%). Tight but Q4 +68% PAT YoY, 52w high yesterday. Stored SL 204 holds; keep room for chop. Hold to target 220."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4500.00,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.4%, CMP 4614 with intraday surge to 4636 (+6.35%). Stored SL 4575 = entry. Trailing UP to 4500 would be LOOSER than 4575 (engine will reject). Need to tighten: new SL 4575 (no change) or tighten further. Best: keep SL 4575 (already at breakeven) and raise target to 4900 reflecting strong defence momentum + 31% MoM rally. Actually new_stop_loss must be ≥ stored 4575 for tightening on a long. Setting SL 4575 is no-op. Just raising target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 506.00,
      "new_target": 540.00,
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 506 = entry. CMP 516.70. ED PMLA raid overhang flagged in research (governance red flag). Q4 results May 11 (4 sessions away — outside 3-session binary window, but close). Stored values match — no change needed. Switching to HOLD with caution."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.9%, SL 506 = entry (breakeven protection). ED PMLA raid overhang noted but research came in AFTER entry; will exit if SL breaks or as Q4 May 11 approaches (binary window). Position size small. Hold for now."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1025 locks in +4%, can't trail tighter without breaching 1% gap rule. Strong fundamentals + sector tailwind."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Geopolitical hedge; SL 119 intact, position size small."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 23.85 already above entry; tighter trail violates gap rule."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "ATH printed; SL 1715 above entry. Will trail on break above 1757."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Intraday pullback after big run; SL 1510 intact, board meet May 14 outside 3-session window."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 13400 close but intact; Q4 done, fundamentals intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4, near 52w high; SL 204 close but valid."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong defence momentum; SL = entry; raised target to 4900. Q4 May 14 — will reassess closer to date."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "ED overhang noted; SL = entry caps downside. Q4 May 11 — will revisit before binary window."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BAJAJ-AUTO and CESC have results TOMORROW (May 6) — explicit NO new entry per binary-event rule, despite strong setups. SYNGENE 15x volume + Bullish Engulfing intriguing but Q4 PAT -36% YoY = mixed picture; watch for follow-through. ADANIGREEN governance overhang (DOJ/SEC) disqualifies on regulatory due diligence. HFCL not deep-dived but +11% gap-up demands fundamental check before entry — stay watchlist. MOTILALOFS clean Q4 ops but consolidated loss from MTM creates noise; pass for now.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 47% deployed across 9 positions, well within all caps. P&L +0.42% today, +0.52% experiment-to-date. VIX rising + Nifty under pivot + multiple binary events in next 9 sessions (BAJAJ-AUTO/CESC May 6, ANANTRAJ May 11, HAL/GESHIP May 14) argue for capital preservation today, not fresh adds. Existing book is balanced (housing finance, port, defence, pharma, bank, auto, realty, shipping, gold hedge) — adding more correlated names today (e.g., MOTILALOFS for financials, ADANIGREEN for energy) would over-cluster. Sticking with HOLD/MODIFY discipline; will revisit after May 6 result prints clear two binary events."
}
